title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入巴拿马：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入巴拿馬：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Panama COPANIT / DGNTI product conformity requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards expected in project specifications, ASEP and distributor (EDEMET / EDECHIS / ENSA) grid-connection requirements, Cuerpo de Bomberos de Panamá fire-safety installation expectations, UN 38.3 transport requirements, and 60 Hz / 120–240 V North American grid context — versus China GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, GB 44240-2024, and NB/T 42090-2016 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与巴拿马COPANIT/DGNTI产品合格评定要求、项目规格预期引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、ASEP及配电公司（EDEMET/EDECHIS/ENSA）并网要求、巴拿马消防总局消防安全安装要求、UN 38.3运输要求及60 Hz / 120–240 V北美电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023、GB 44240-2024和NB/T 42090-2016基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與巴拿馬COPANIT/DGNTI產品合格評定要求、項目規格預期引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、ASEP及配電公司（EDEMET/EDECHIS/ENSA）併網要求、巴拿馬消防總局消防安全安裝要求、UN 38.3運輸要求及60 Hz / 120–240 V北美電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023、GB 44240-2024和NB/T 42090-2016基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, DGNTI / COPANIT conformity scope determination, ASEP grid-connection approval, Cuerpo de Bomberos de Panamá fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Panama DGNTI / COPANIT Technical Standards, ASEP interconnection requirements, distributor technical connection requirements, Cuerpo de Bomberos fire-safety installation requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、DGNTI/COPANIT合格评定范围裁定、ASEP并网批准、巴拿马消防总局消防安全安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行巴拿马DGNTI/COPANIT技术标准、ASEP并网要求、配电公司技术接入要求、消防总局消防安全安装要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、DGNTI/COPANIT合格評定範圍裁定、ASEP併網批准、巴拿馬消防總局消防安全安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行巴拿馬DGNTI/COPANIT技術標準、ASEP併網要求、配電公司技術接入要求、消防總局消防安全安裝要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Panama does not yet have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to a pre-market certification regime. BESS projects in Panama operate primarily under project-specific international standards referenced in ASEP / distributor interconnection agreements and Cuerpo de Bomberos de Panamá fire-safety approvals. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Panama are: (1) a fundamental frequency and voltage mismatch — Panama operates at 60 Hz / 120–240 V (North American system) whereas China's BESS products are designed and validated for 50 Hz / 220–380 V; PCS firmware, protection relay settings, transformer specifications, and auxiliary load equipment must be reconfigured and retested for Panama's grid before interconnection; (2) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected baseline for project acceptance, since Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications; (3) IEC 62933 system-level technical requirements where referenced in ASEP / distributor specifications; (4) Cuerpo de Bomberos de Panamá fire-safety installation approval, including evidence aligned with NFPA codes as Panama's primary fire-safety reference; (5) UN 38.3 transport test documentation mandatory under international transport conventions for shipments through the Port of Balboa and the Port of Colón. Panama's growing solar and storage market — driven by grid stability needs and the Panama Canal logistics hub context — presents real commercial opportunity, but the 60 Hz / North American voltage system difference is a fundamental engineering gate that Chinese exporters must address before equipment procurement is finalised.
answer_first.zh: 巴拿马尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与上市前认证制度相当。巴拿马的BESS项目主要依据ASEP/配电公司并网协议和巴拿马消防总局消防安全审批中引用的项目专属国际标准运作。中国BESS出口巴拿马的实际差距包括：（1）根本性的频率和电压差异——巴拿马采用60 Hz / 120–240 V（北美体系），而中国BESS产品针对50 Hz / 220–380 V进行设计和验证；PCS固件、保护继电器定值、变压器规格及辅助负载设备须在并网前重新配置并针对巴拿马电网重新测试；（2）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，作为项目验收的国际预期基准，因为中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不被项目技术规格接受为替代依据；（3）ASEP/配电公司规格中引用的IEC 62933系统级技术要求；（4）巴拿马消防总局消防安全安装审批，包括与巴拿马主要消防安全参考规范NFPA规范相符的证据；（5）国际运输公约强制要求的UN 38.3运输测试文件，适用于经巴尔博亚港和科隆港的货物。巴拿马不断增长的太阳能和储能市场——由电网稳定需求和巴拿马运河物流枢纽背景驱动——提供了真实商业机遇，但60 Hz / 北美电压体系差异是中国出口商在设备采购最终确定前必须解决的根本性工程门槛。
answer_first.zht: 巴拿馬尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與上市前認證制度相當。巴拿馬的BESS項目主要依據ASEP/配電公司併網協議和巴拿馬消防總局消防安全審批中引用的項目專屬國際標準運作。中國BESS出口巴拿馬的實際差距包括：（1）根本性的頻率和電壓差異——巴拿馬採用60 Hz / 120–240 V（北美體系），而中國BESS產品針對50 Hz / 220–380 V進行設計和驗證；PCS韌體、保護繼電器定值、變壓器規格及輔助負載設備須在併網前重新配置並針對巴拿馬電網重新測試；（2）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，作為項目驗收的國際預期基準，因為中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不被項目技術規格接受為替代依據；（3）ASEP/配電公司規格中引用的IEC 62933系統級技術要求；（4）巴拿馬消防總局消防安全安裝審批，包括與巴拿馬主要消防安全參考規範NFPA規範相符的證據；（5）國際運輸公約強制要求的UN 38.3運輸測試文件，適用於經巴爾博亞港和科隆港的貨物。巴拿馬不斷增長的太陽能和儲能市場——由電網穩定需求和巴拿馬運河物流樞紐背景驅動——提供了真實商業機遇，但60 Hz / 北美電壓體系差異是中國出口商在設備採購最終確定前必須解決的根本性工程門檻。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
